title: Price's Candles Tapered Dinner Candles White Unscented Wax Pack of 50 | 7 Hour Burn Time Elegant Long Candles for Home Decor, Events, Celebrations & Dining
features: Classic White Tapered Candles for Every Setting: Add timeless charm to your table with white dinner candles, ideal for events, ceremonies, and daily home use with a clean and sophisticated appearance.
Extended 7 Hour Burn Time for Reliability: Enjoy consistent illumination from these long-burning taper candles, designed to glow for up to 7 hours, perfect for long dinners and special celebrations.
Unscented and Suitable for All Environments: Crafted for a clean burn without scent, these unscented candles are perfect for indoor use, allowing use around food, guests, and sensitive settings.
Perfect Fit for Candle Holders and Displays: Designed to suit most standard candle holders, these tapered candles enhance decorative displays, religious observances, and festive table arrangements.
Bulk Value Pack for Events and Everyday Use: Includes 50 premium white wax candles, ideal for weddings, holidays, restaurants, event planners, or simply stocking up on quality essentials at home.
